subject: fix(docs): update README to reflect completed backend integration
body:
README still described the app as localStorage/mock-data only with
backend "planned." Phase 8 (Backend) is complete — Supabase Auth,
realtime subscriptions, and tool-till-tees REST API are all integrated.

Updated: current status, tech stack, project structure, setup
instructions (env vars, auth flow), feature list (added auth, realtime),
and documentation table (added migration guide).

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch

title: update README to reflect completed backend integration
